payload.answer: That request is too broad to store as a useful durable memory. Please choose a narrower AI-related fact, preference, project detail, or topic area you want remembered.
repair_options: Store a specific AI-related preference, e.g. “I prefer concise explanations of AI concepts.”
Store a specific AI project detail, e.g. “I am working on an AI chatbot for customer support.”
Store a specific AI learning goal, e.g. “I want to learn about transformer models.”
Do not store anything from this request.
